ArtifactController.cs.Label: API Controller
ArtifactController.cs.Description: This controller handles incoming artifact generation requests for both demo and user-uploaded files. It performs basic request validation, handles 400 and 500 level errors accordingly, and supports cancellation.

NoteDtos.Label: Query Parameter Validation
NoteDtos.Text: When using [ApiController], values passed as query parameters are validated during model binding. Invalid or missing values will produce an automatic 400 BadRequest. Manual validation is still needed to catch empty strings.

NoteDtos.Label: Request Body Validation
NoteDtos.Text: When using [ApiController] and a DTO with properties that have the [Required] attribute, the framework will handle validation during model binding and automatically return a 400 BadRequest if a value is not found. The [Required] attribute does protect against empty strings so manual validation is not necessary unless further customization is desired.

NoteDtos.Label: Cancellation Support
NoteDtos.Text: Each endpoint should accept a CancellationToken and pass it along to any async method calls. If the cancellation token is not passed, work may continue after the request is no longer needed.
